creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 221229
Patch for greenbone-security-assistant9

Add missing dependency of libgpg-error (reported by poudriere)
Change HTTP to HTTPS
Minor adjustments to Makefile to follow Porters Handbook and make portlint less unhappy

Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
